title: Chandrila Skies
content:
{{Top|ga|leg|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Chandrila}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Chandrila Skies'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Uulshos Manufacturing/Legends|Uulshos Manufacturing]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' |line= |model= |type=[[Realspace/Legends|Space]]-capable [[light assault vehicle]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=Slightly longer than an [[XJ6 X-wing starfighter]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=2 |skeleton= |passengers=Around 12 |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Shuttle/Legends|Shuttle]] |commission= |destroyed=[[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'', including the ''Chandrila Skies''{{'s}} destruction in [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], to [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. |retired= |battles=[[Operation Roundabout]] |affiliation=[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] |navy=[[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]] |fleet=[[Team Womp Rat]] |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|''Chandrila Skies''?''"
"''Took a direct hit. She's gone.|Jedi Grand Master Luke Skywalker and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]|}} '''''Chandrila Skies''''' was a [[Realspace/Legends|space]]-capable [[light assault vehicle]] produced by [[Uulshos Manufacturing/Legends|Uulshos Manufacturing]] that was part of the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]] by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Attached to the [[Galactic-class battle carrier|battle carrier]] [[Dodonna (Galactic-class)|''Dodonna'']], the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] took part in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] [[Operation Roundabout]] against the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] and was guarded by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]-composed [[Hardpoint Squadron]] as it attempted to extract the Jedi of [[Team Tauntaun]] and [[Team Purella]] from Corellia. However, ''[[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] Skies'' took a direct hit by [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Flak/Legends|flak]] while attempting to reach the surface and was destroyed, making it one of the first casualties of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. ==Description== Produced by [[Uulshos Manufacturing/Legends|Uulshos Manufacturing]], ''Chandrila Skies'' was a modified{{CSWECite|I|119|''Chandrila Skies''}} [[light assault vehicle]] that was capable of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] flight. Measuring slightly longer than an [[XJ6 X-wing starfighter]] in length, ''Chandrila Skies'' possessed a horizontal wedge-shaped prow, and its broad [[Armor/Legends|armored]] fuselage allowed it the room to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] approximately a dozen passengers in addition to its crew of two. It was slower in flight than a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. ==History== {{Quote|Hyperspace jump complete. All squadrons, prepare to launch. Hardpoint Squadron, Shuttle ''Chandrila Skies'', first in queue.|Starfighter control, after the starship ''Dodonna'' arrives at Corellia|}} Named after the [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]]{{CSWECite|I|119|Chandrila}} of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], ''Chandrila Skies'' served as a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] in the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]] by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], at a [[Time/Legends|time]] when the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] was challenging the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] for greater independence. In order to keep the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in line, the Galactic Alliance conducted [[Operation Roundabout]] as a show of force, deploying parts of the Second [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] in [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] space while four [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] teams pursued various objectives on Corellia and the nearby [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] [[Centerpoint Station]]. ''Chandrila Skies'' was part of [[Team Womp Rat]], which included the ten Jedi-[[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] XJ6 [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] of [[Hardpoint Squadron]] led by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. Their group was tasked with extracting the Jedi of Teams [[Team Tauntaun|Tauntaun]] and [[Team Purella|Purella]] from Corellia, with Hardpoint [[Squadron/Legends|Squadron]] on hand as a guard. After the [[Galactic-class battle carrier|''Galactic''-class battle carrier]] [[Dodonna (Galactic-class)|''Dodonna'']] decanted from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] over Corellia, ''Chandrila Skies'' and Hardpoint Squadron were first in the launch queue for ''Dodonna''{{'s}} starfighter [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] and soon made a high orbital crossing of the planet's [[Standard day/Legends|day]] side, before plunging into Corellia's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. However, [[Corellian Home Fleet|Corellian forces]] had been aware of the imminent Galactic Alliance operation and assaulted the elements of the Second Fleet when they arrived. Starfighters launched to intercept Team [[Womp rat/Legends|Womp Rat]], and a ground-based [[Starship/Legends|antispacecraft]] volley targeted ''Chandrila Skies'' and Hardpoint Squadron. The shuttle took a direct hit and was destroyed, along with the crew; the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] Jedi [[Toile Senn]] from Hardpoint Squadron was also [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the barrage. The Jedi that ''Chandrila Skies'' was supposed to pick up were forced to improvise their extraction, and ''Chandrila Skies'' and its crew of two became some of the first casualties of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], which came about due to Operation Roundabout's failure to cow the Corellians. ==Behind the scenes== ''Chandrila Skies'' first appeared in [[Aaron Allston]]'s [[2006]] novel, [[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal|''Betrayal'']], which was the first installment of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series. The shuttle also received an entry in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. The entry's description of ''Chandrila Skies''{{'}} destruction differs from that of ''Betrayal''{{'s}}, with the former attributing the cause to Corellian [[Warship/Legends|warships]], while the novel has it hit by ground-based [[Flak/Legends|flak]]. This article treats ''Betrayal'' as the correct version of events. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Himmel von Chandrila }} [[Category:Shuttles]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Alliance]] [[Category:Uulshos Manufacturing products]]
